title: Phulrani
overview: Based on George Bernard Shaw`s classic Pygmalion, Phulrani revolves around Vikram, who runs a model grooming agency, takes a unique challenge to groom Shevanta, a raw florist girl from Fishermens` Colony into winning a Beauty Pageant. Will it result in a love story?
